title: HUMMBL Cross-Repo Shared Reference Definitions v0.1
description: Candidate definition library for cross-repo contract schemas. These definitions do not replace domain payload schemas or authority objects.
$comment: The stdlib SchemaValidator resolves $ref against this document via RefRegistry. Runtime cross-repo schemas may reference definitions such as https://hummbl.dev/schemas/cross-repo-shared-refs-v0.1.schema.json#/$defs/repo_ref.

repo_ref.description: GitHub-style owner/repository reference. It identifies a repository, not its authority scope.

artifact_ref.description: Resolvable or locally scoped artifact locator. Resolution and integrity require separate evidence.

schema_ref.description: Versioned or immutable payload-schema reference owned by the producing repository.

actor_or_authority_ref.description: Reference to an authority declaration. This does not flatten domain-specific authority objects.

receipt_ref.description: Typed receipt locator or logical identifier with a declared resolver.

identifier_namespace.description: Producer-owned identifier namespace recorded by the contract.

contract_version_declaration.description: Exact contract SemVer or bounded patch wildcard.

payload_version.description: Opaque version identifier owned by the payload-producing repository.
